alien_translation_todo.significance: Developer TODO with actual alien-to-English translations still in data. Shows alien language was being developed with real cipher system. Instructions say to 'Remove actual Translations, Add alien Font Tags' - meaning the translations were meant to be hidden behind alien font rendering.

zzz_Collect a Mini Nuke with the Money Bags Backpack equipped

zzz_Kill an Enemy with the Money Bags Backpack equipped test
zzz_Craft Ballistic Ammo with the Money Bags Backpack equipped
ZZZ Kill the cultists standing guard

horse_dismount_string.text: Dismount Horse before going through door.
horse_dismount_string.significance: Inherited from Skyrim/FO4 engine. Shows mount/dismount system exists in engine code.

steal_horse_prompt.text: Do you want to steal this horse?
steal_horse_prompt.significance: Skyrim-era string still present in FO76 data

dungeon_cleared.significance: Generic dungeon completion message - may relate to instanced content system

faction_raids.text: Faction for the player during raids
faction_raids.significance: Vault Raid system faction assignment - raids were removed from game

casino_disabled.significance: Casino system exists but is disabled - Atlantic City DLC related

ghoul_player_system_strings.significance: Ghoul transformation feature has extensive UI strings including disable/maintenance messages suggesting it was toggled on/off during development

babylon_death_lines.text: Seems like someone got the best of you, better luck next time!... or not. Probably not.
That didn't seem to go as planned. Was there a plan?
"Do I even have teammates?" you muttered through your last breath.
Your performance seemed pretty strong there for a minute or two.
"How does one miss so many shots?" they thought as they looted your corpse.

babylon_victory_lines.text: You have ascended to a higher plane of existence. One where doors and even chairs open up to you.
Hold on to that four leaf clover. First, you survive the nuclear holocaust - now this. Keep it up!
Sometimes you have to ruffle some feathers on your way to the top. Or murder your enemies..
After catching your breath from all the killing, you realize you left the oven on in the vault.
Murder sure does work up a thirst. Grab a Nuka-Cola and kick back - you deserve it!

survival_mode_remnants.significance: Complete Survival Mode UI still in localization - leaderboards, rules, scoring. Mode was removed.
sample_strings: Other players may be attacked without restriction
Cap rewards for player kills are doubled

expedition_placeholder.text: This is just a placeholder for where the tutorial message explaining how to launch expeditions would go.

ghoul_placeholder.text: (TEMP) This is placeholder. Will be replaced with a tutorial screen listing benefits and downsides of playing as a ghoul.

nuclear_winter_analysis.significance: All 13 languages still have complete Nuclear Winter translations. The mode was removed in 2021 but all localization data remains intact.
